about: Ploinky MCP adapter that wraps Open Interpreter for bounded, workspace-confined local coding and analysis tasks. Telemetry is disabled by default.
install: if [ -z "$OPEN_INTERPRETER_SKIP_INSTALL" ]; then python3 -m pip install --quiet --no-cache-dir --upgrade pip && python3 -m pip install --quiet --no-cache-dir open-interpreter==0.4.3; fi
